docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GONZALEZ, R. MARGOT AS TO DEFENDANT JOHNSON, DAVID E.L MYLER, MARK DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED

JURY TRIAL STRICKEN, TO COURT TRIAL ON APR-18-1995 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 01 PER DEPARTMENT AT SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE

JUDGE DIANE ELAN WICK;CLERK:ECLAVERIA;RPTR:BRENDA FIELDS C/C FOR COURT TRIAL. PLFF. THRU COUNSEL BRENDA KEITH PRESENT AND BOTH DEFTS NOT PRESEENT. COURT PROCEEDED ON COURT TRIAL. NO ATTY FEES AS AGAINST MARK MYLER WHO DID NOT SIGN THE LEASE AGREEMENT. PLFF PREPARES JUDGMENT. EXHIBITS WITHDRAWN.

LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 02, MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS, CALENDAR OF MAR-27-1995 STRICKEN, MOTION PREMATURE.
